cases.title: Final permit submission is blocked
cases.reason: Submitting a permit request is an official DevHub action and cannot be completed by the agent without user attendance and action-specific confirmation.
cases.agent_instruction: Explain that the agent may prepare draft values, but must stop before final submission.

citations.title: DevHub permit application guide
citations.evidence_label: Guide describes permit request application and submission workflow.

cases.title: Certification acknowledgement requires exact confirmation
cases.reason: Acknowledgement and certification steps represent user attestations, so the agent must present the exact action and wait for the user to confirm it.
cases.agent_instruction: Ask the user to attend the browser session and confirm the exact certification action before any click occurs.

citations.title: DevHub permit application guide
citations.evidence_label: Guide includes acknowledgement and application flow checkpoints.

cases.title: Draft data entry is reversible
cases.reason: Entering application facts before submission can be staged as draft work when the user facts are sufficient and no official submission is made.
cases.agent_instruction: Draft field values only in a reversible state and keep the user-facing review step open before submission.

citations.title: DevHub permit application guide
citations.evidence_label: Guide describes dynamic application questions and save-for-later style workflow behavior.

cases.title: License-related facts are missing
cases.reason: Standard trade permit options can depend on contractor license information, so the agent needs license-related facts before deciding whether the draft path is available.
cases.agent_instruction: Ask a narrow question about the relevant contractor license status before selecting fixture or trade permit options.

citations.title: Online permitting tools overview
citations.evidence_label: Overview links DevHub trade permit and online permitting guidance.

citations.title: DevHub FAQ
citations.evidence_label: FAQ describes account-scoped permit services and trade permit workflows.

cases.title: Fee payment guidance needs freshness review
cases.reason: Fee payment instructions are high-impact and may change, so stale source evidence must be flagged before the agent relies on it.
cases.agent_instruction: Warn the user that the fee workflow source needs a freshness check and avoid entering payment details or submitting payment.

citations.title: How to pay fees guide
citations.evidence_label: Guide covers fee payment workflow and final payment behavior.

cases.title: Permit path is unsupported for DevHub automation
cases.reason: Some permit types use email or other non-DevHub submission paths, so the agent cannot assume that DevHub automation applies.
cases.agent_instruction: Explain the unsupported path and hand the user to the official manual instructions for that permit type.

citations.title: Apply for permits
citations.evidence_label: Official permit application guidance distinguishes paths for permit requests.
